nasb.text: When we had heard this, we as well as the local residents began begging him not to go up to Jerusalem.

esv.text: When we heard this, we and the people there urged him not to go up to Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 我們聽了這些話，就和當地的人勸保羅不要去耶路撒冷。

ccb.text: 听到这话，我们和当地的信徒都苦劝保罗不要去耶路撒冷。

csbs.text: 我们一听这些话，就和当地的人恳求保罗不要上耶路撒冷去。
